overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a tropical coastal fishing village at night. The player moves along wooden piers over water and transitions to dirt paths through a shantytown with stilt houses, eventually encountering an NPC near fishing crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier walkway over water in coastal shantytown

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden pier over calm water between stilt houses

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow walkway over the water
calm dark water surrounding the pier on both sides
wooden shacks built on stilts over the water with warm interior lighting
rocky shoreline with dense tropical vegetation rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow wooden pier over dark water at night, flanked by stilt houses on both sides. The path is illuminated by warm lights from the wooden shacks while stars are visible in the night sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through coastal village with scattered shacks

events.description: transitions from wooden pier onto dirt ground path moving inland

agents.ego_description: walking along dirt path through the village, passing wooden shacks and chain fences

entered.detail: unpaved dirt road winding through the coastal settlement
metal mesh fencing lining the right side of the path
tall wooden pole with street lighting and wires
small building perched on rocky outcrop with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from wooden planks to dirt ground as the camera moves deeper into the village. Passing chain-link fences, utility poles, and wooden shacks built on rocky terrain, with palm trees visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with lit building and fishing equipment

events.description: slows approach near NPC and fishing crates before continuing toward stairs

agents.ego_description: approaching a local villager near fishing crates and moving toward a brightly lit house with wooden stairs

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt standing up from fishing crates as camera approaches

entered.detail: stacked wooden cages and containers used for storing fishing equipment
exterior staircase leading up to a raised wooden house
brightly illuminated wooden building with warm yellow porch lights
raised wooden platform surrounding the house entrance

segments.scene_description: Approaching a villager standing near stacked fishing crates and cages. The camera moves toward a brightly lit wooden house on stilts with an external staircase, passing the NPC who stands up as the player approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow wooden pier over dark water into the heart of a rustic coastal village. It begins by moving along a plank walkway flanked by stilt houses, where warm interior lights glow against a starry night sky. As the camera advances, the wooden path transitions into a dirt trail that winds through rocky terrain past chain-link fences, utility poles, and towering palm trees. The scene then shifts toward a brightly lit wooden house with an external staircase, passing by stacked fishing crates and cages. Finally, the camera approaches a villager who stands up as the movement draws closer to the illuminated dwelling.
